service.name: OpenAI Fine-Tuning API
service.description_for_ai: Train custom versions of GPT models on your data. Better accuracy for specific tasks, consistent output format, fewer prompt tokens needed. Fine-tune gpt-4o-mini for $0.008/1K training tokens.

auth.cost: Training: $0.008/1K tokens for gpt-4o-mini. Inference: $0.30/$1.20 per 1M tokens for fine-tuned

capabilities.description_for_ai: Start fine-tuning a GPT model on custom training data. Training file must be uploaded first via Files API.

training_file.description: File ID from Files API containing JSONL training data

suffix.description: Custom name suffix for fine-tuned model

agent_hints.training_format: JSONL format: each line is {messages: [{role: system, content: ...}, {role: user, content: ...}, {role: assistant, content: ...}]}
agent_hints.min_examples: Minimum 10 examples, recommend 50-100+ for good results.
agent_hints.use_cases: Response format consistency, domain-specific knowledge, specialized tone, instruction following improvement.
